cleanedEvents.title: Grouped labs/urinalysis
cleanedEvents.description: Grouped laboratory and urinalysis results documented.
cleanedEvents.sourceExcerpt: If symptoms persist, go to the ER for evaluation. See if the lab can add on an A1c. Other labs are in process.

cleanedEvents.title: Grouped medications
cleanedEvents.sourceExcerpt: t Medications include lidocaine-prilocaine cream, hyoscyamine, magnesium oxide, ondansetron, polyethylene glycol, cyanocobalamin, hydrocortisone, and fludrocortisone.
